title: Enabling working group reports: 10 Year Health Plan for England
body: "The Secretary of State for Health and Social Care established 11 working groups to support the development of the 10 Year Health Plan.  Each group had 2 co-chairs - one from either the Department of Health and Social Care (DHSC) or NHS England, and one external to these organisations.  On this page you will find reports from the 7 enabling working groups who considered areas that needed to change to enable the vision for the NHS to become a reality.  See the reports from the 4 vision working groups.  Read more about the membership of the groups and their tasking statements. "
